# NomadTechCareer.com

> Practical guides for tech professionals who work from anywhere.

NomadTechCareer is a content site focused on location-independent work for tech professionals. It covers remote work strategies, essential tools and setups, and in-depth city guides for popular digital nomad destinations.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://nomadtechcareer.com/
- Articles hub: https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/
- City Guides hub: https://nomadtechcareer.com/city-guides/

## Articles

- [5 Reasons Tech Professionals Are Choosing Location Independence in 2026](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/location-independence-tech-professionals-2026/) — Why tech pros are going location-independent: cost arbitrage, timezone flexibility, infrastructure improvements, career growth, and life experience.
- [The Digital Nomad's Tech Stack: Essential Tools for Working Anywhere](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/digital-nomad-tech-stack-essential-tools/) — Complete tech stack for remote work: connectivity, communication, productivity, security, finance, and hardware recommendations.
- [The Remote Tech Professional's Tax Guide: What You Need to Know in 2026](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/remote-tech-professional-tax-guide-2026/) — Tax implications of working remotely from different countries. PE risk, 183-day rules, and how to document business travel properly.
- [Essential Tech Stack for Location-Independent Professionals](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/essential-tech-stack-location-independent-professionals/) — The actual tools you need to work location-independently in 2026. Communication, security, banking, connectivity -- honest pros and cons.
- [Why Tech Professionals Are Leaving Traditional Employment in 2026](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/why-tech-professionals-leaving-traditional-employment-2026/) — Why tech professionals are choosing independence over employment. Layoffs, AI disruption, and the economics of going solo.
- [Coworking Spaces vs. Coffee Shops vs. Home: The Real Trade-offs for Remote Workers](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/coworking-vs-coffee-shop-vs-home-remote-workers/) — Honest comparison of workspaces for remote workers. Coworking, coffee shops, and home -- real costs, productivity, and trade-offs.
- [How to Document Business Travel for Tax Purposes: A Practical Guide](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/document-business-travel-tax/) — How to document business travel for tax deductions. Receipts, logs, digital tools, and the reasonable business purpose test.
- [Setting Up a Remote Work Base in a New City: A Step-by-Step Guide](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/setting-up-remote-work-base-new-city/) — How to set up a productive remote work base in a new city. Accommodation, internet, banking, SIM cards, and building a routine from scratch.
- [The Real Costs of Working Remotely from Abroad: 2026 Breakdown](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/real-costs-working-remotely-abroad-2026/) — Actual monthly budgets for remote workers in Lisbon, Valencia, Medellin, Bangkok, and Tbilisi. Hidden costs, real comparisons, and when cheaper isn't cheaper.
- [How to Maintain Client Relationships While Working Across Time Zones](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/maintain-client-relationships-across-time-zones/) — How to maintain strong client relationships while working remotely across time zones. Async communication, overlap strategies, and when timezone gaps become deal-breakers.
- [Health Insurance for Location-Independent Professionals: Options That Actually Work](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/health-insurance-location-independent-professionals/) — Health insurance options for location-independent professionals in 2026. Travel insurance vs expat insurance, provider comparisons, and coverage gaps to watch for.
- [Building a Professional Network When You Move Every Few Months](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/building-professional-network-location-independent/) — How to build and maintain a real professional network when you're location-independent. Coworking communities, LinkedIn strategy, and the difference between travel friends and professional relationships.

## City Guides

- [Working from Valencia, Spain](https://nomadtechcareer.com/city-guides/working-from-valencia/) — Comprehensive guide to remote work from Valencia: coworking spaces, neighborhoods, internet, costs, visa options, and daily life.

## About

Created by Gregor Spielmann. This site is built and operated with AI agents.
